## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Template Version
Which version are you using?

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Create new app with version '...'
2. Run command '....'
3. Configure '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen when following the documentation.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens. Include error messages, stack traces, etc.

## Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- Node.js version: [e.g. 18.17.0]
- npm version: [e.g. 9.6.7]
- Wrangler version: [e.g. 3.22.0]
- Operating System: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Cloudflare Workers plan: [Free/Paid]

## wrangler.toml Configuration
```toml
# Paste relevant configuration (remove secrets)

```

## Code Sample
```typescript
// Include code that causes the issue

```

## Error Message
```
Paste error message and stack trace here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Possible Solution
If you have ideas on how to fix this, please describe them here.
